mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document_version (document_id, version_no, title, content, editor_id, change_note, create_time) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{versionNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{editorId}, #{changeNote}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_document_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY version_no DESC
SELECT * FROM kb_document_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND version_no = #{versionNo}
